info.description: Production-grade REST API with JWT authentication, file upload, and PostgreSQL.
info.title: Fullstack Go API

post.description: Authenticate with email and password, returns JWT token

get.description: Returns the profile of the currently authenticated user

patch.description: Allows updating full_name and/or avatar_url of the currently authenticated user

post.description: Create a new user account with email and password
Creates a new blog category. Requires authentication.

put.description: Updates a blog category by ID. Requires authentication.

delete.description: Deletes a blog category by ID. Requires authentication.

put.description: Edits the content of a comment. Only the original author can do this.

delete.description: Soft-deletes a comment. Only the original author can do this.

get.description: Returns server and database connection status
Returns a paginated list of blog posts with optional filtering by status, category, tag, author, and search

post.description: Creates a new blog post. Requires authentication.

get.description: Returns a single blog post by its URL slug, incrementing the view count
Returns a single blog post by its UUID, incrementing the view count

put.description: Updates a blog post. Only the original author can update it.

delete.description: Deletes a blog post. Only the original author can delete it.

get.description: Returns a threaded (nested) list of comments for a given post

post.description: Adds a comment (or reply) to a blog post. Requires authentication.

patch.description: Toggles a post between draft and published. Only the author can do this.

post.description: Creates a new blog tag. Requires authentication.

delete.description: Deletes a blog tag by ID. Requires authentication.

post.description: Upload a file (image or document). Returns the file URL. Max size 10MB.
